subcodes.first_line: Kind friend, For long has the road of amity been closed, and the heart and the soul are wearied and sorely afflicted
subcodes.first_line_orig: یار مهربان مدتیست که بکلی راه الفت بسته و جان و دل آزرده و خسته گشته نه یادی
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
